name: Lemon Party Meringue Pie
recipeIngredient: Lemon flavored pudding and pie filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pie filling mix, 2/3 cup sugar, and 1/4 cup water in a saucepan.
2. Blend in the egg yolks and remaining water.
3. Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture comes to a full rolling boil.
4. Remove from heat and blend in lemon juice and butter.
5. Cool for 5 minutes, stirring twice.
6. Pour into the prepared pie shell.
7. Beat egg whites until foamy.
8. Gradually beat in 6 tablespoons sugar and continue beating until the mixture forms shiny peaks.
9. Spread over the pie filling.
10. Bake at 425°F for 5 to 10 minutes or until the meringue is delicately brown.
11. Cool for at least 4 hours before cutting.
